content:
🚀 skills | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enhance the functionality and reliability of AI coding agents by providing a set of practical, adaptable skills that improve alignment, reduce verbosity, and facilitate better communication between developers and agents.
✨ Key Features: • Shell-based agent skills for coding agents • Composable and adaptable skills • Addresses common agent failure modes (misalignment, verbosity)
📖 Summary: This repository provides a collection of shell-based 'skills' for real engineers, designed to enhance the capabilities of coding agents. These skills are intended to be small, adaptable, and composable, aiming to improve agent performance by addressing common failure modes like misalignment and verbosity.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
